title: Golf day on 1 June for hostel floor-fund
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The hostel of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The hostel of Hoërskool Wittedrift is in desperate need of new floors and to boost the floor-fund a golf day will be held at Goose Valley Golf Estate on 1 June.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The hostel of Hoërskool Wittedrift is in desperate need of new floors and to boost the floor-fund a golf day will be held at Goose Valley Golf Estate on 1 June."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The day will take the form of a four-ball (with a twist!) and the shotgun start will be at 11:00.","html":"The day will take the form of a four-ball (with a twist!) and the shotgun start will be at 11:00."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Golfers are invited to be part of the day at R2 200 per four-ball or R3 500 to sponsor a hole and play on the day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To sponsor a hole with branding, the cost is R1 500. For more information, contact Jaco O'Kelly on 076 583 9503.","html":"To sponsor a hole with branding, the cost is R1 500. For more information, contact Jaco O'Kelly on 076 583 9503."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Golf day on 1 June for hostel floor-fund
